'''thakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cultically|cultically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cultically|cultically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thakate|thakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thakatesher|thakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakatesherĂ«m|thakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thakatero|thakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thakateshĂ«|thakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakateshĂ«m|thakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithakatero|gokithakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithakateshĂ«|gokithakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakateshĂ«m|gokithakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothakankerom|gothakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothakankeshĂ«|gothakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothakankeshĂ«m|gothakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothakankeya|gothakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thakaterom|thakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakatemu|thakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thakateya|thakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithakaterom|gokithakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakatemu|gokithakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithakateya|gokithakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thakakate|thakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thakakatesher|thakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakakatesherĂ«m|thakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thakakatero|thakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thakakateshĂ«|thakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakakateshĂ«m|thakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithakakatero|gokithakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithakakateshĂ«|gokithakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakakateshĂ«m|gokithakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothakakankerom|gothakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothakakankeshĂ«|gothakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothakakankeshĂ«m|gothakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothakakankeya|gothakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thakakaterom|thakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakakatemu|thakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thakakateya|thakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithakakaterom|gokithakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakakatemu|gokithakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithakakateya|gokithakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠte|thĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠtesher|thĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠtero|thĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠkĂŠtero|gokithĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠterom|thĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠtemu|thĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠkĂŠteya|thĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠkĂŠterom|gokithĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠkĂŠteya|gokithĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafkafte|thafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafkaftesher|thafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafkaftesherĂ«m|thafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafkaftero|thafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafkafteshĂ«|thafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafkafteshĂ«m|thafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafkaftero|gokithafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafkafteshĂ«|gokithafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafkafteshĂ«m|gokithafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafkafnkerom|gothafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafkafnkeshĂ«|gothafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafkafnkeshĂ«m|gothafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafkafnkeya|gothafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafkafterom|thafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafkaftemu|thafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafkafteya|thafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafkafterom|gokithafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafkaftemu|gokithafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafkafteya|gokithafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
